limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific spend or dedicated AI budget disclosed; AI mentioned only as one element of broader cost-reduction and technology deployment strategy. Data center load growth is discussed as a demand driver for transmission investment, not as FirstEnergy's own AI capex.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases are described only aspirationally (cost savings, technology deployment) with no named initiatives, deployment status, or metrics. References to AI data centers relate to external customers/regulatory context, not FirstEnergy's own AI programs.

capex_mentions: The Energize365 five-year capital plan (~25% higher than prior plan) is mentioned but not explicitly tied to AI investment by FirstEnergy itself; it relates to grid reliability and data center load support for customers.
